_readme: Neuro-Commerce OS character registry (v2.0). Locked brand characters for consistent AI video generation: generate_locked_video(character_id, prompt) loads every image in `images`, converts them to Base64, and sends them as input_references to the video model so the character stays visually IDENTICAL across every ad, reel, and story. Drop 3–6 reference images per character (front, 3/4, profile, full-body, expression close-up) into the folder referenced by `images`. locked_traits are appended to every prompt as non-negotiable visual constraints.

luma.name: Luma
luma.role: NextLuma brand avatar — the face of demo engagements and tutorials
luma.description: Confident, warm tech-consultant persona; mid-20s; modern minimal wardrobe in the NextLuma palette (Architect Navy suit, Cyber Cyan accent).
locked_traits: same face and hairstyle in every frame — no drift between shots
wardrobe: Architect Navy base with a single Cyber Cyan accent
background: minimal architectural spaces from the NextLuma visual OS
luma.notes: SAMPLE character — replace the placeholder reference images with real renders before production use.
